figures.caption: Figure 1: BOOLXLMM architecture highlighting three stages where LLMs are incorporated to enhance explainability: (1) LLM Feature Selection, which identifies semantically meaningful and business-relevant features; (2) LLM Threshold Recommendation, which proposes context-aware discretization thresholds for numerical variables to improve semantic clarity; (3) LLM-Assisted Rule Compression and Interpretation, which produces human-readable explanations at both global and local levels.
